struct Parser {
    buffer: Vec<u8>,
    position: usize,
    input: String,
}

impl Parser {
    fn new(input: String) -> Self {
        Parser {
            buffer: Vec::new(),
            position: 0,
            input,
        }
    }

    fn parse_next(&mut self) -> Option<Parsed> {
        let p = Parsed {
            buffer: &mut self.buffer,
            position: self.position,
        };
        self.position += 1;
        Some(p)
    }
}

struct Parsed<'a> {
    buffer: &'a mut Vec<u8>,
    position: usize,
}
